breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Kuwait says new Iran attack ‘dangerous escalation’
breaking.summary: Kuwait says it’s responding to ‘hostile’ missile and drone attacks; U.S. military says it shot down Iranian drones launched toward Strait of Hormuz

breaking.title: Israeli airstrikes kill nine, including Lebanese army officers after ceasefire deal
breaking.summary: The continued, deliberate, and repeated Israeli aggression against Lebanon, its people and its army only strengthens our resolve, faith and determination, the Lebanese army said in a statement

breaking.title: US and Iran exchange strikes in Gulf in latest test of ceasefire
breaking.summary: The US military strikes Iranian drones and radar sites and Tehran says it has targeted US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain.

breaking.title: 'Hostile missiles, drones intercepted': Kuwait, Bahrain come under Iranian attack; watch
breaking.summary: Iran launched ballistic missiles and drones toward Kuwait and Bahrain, prompting air defense responses in both nations. The US military intercepted Iranian missiles and drones targeting the Strait of Hormuz and allies, striking Iranian radar sites in response. These actions escalate tensions between Tehran and Washington amid ongoing regional confrontations.

breaking.title: Lebanon says three soldiers killed in Israeli attack on car
breaking.summary: The Israeli military is investigating the incident in south Lebanon, where it is fighting Hezbollah.

breaking.title: Israeli forces kill Palestinian baby in occupied West Bank, say health officials
breaking.summary: Israeli soldiers accused of harming Palestinians are rarely penalised and were indicted in fewer than 1% of cases based on 2,427 complaints alleging wrongdoing between 2016 and 2024, according to Israeli rights group Yesh Din

breaking.title: Ukrainian drones target St Petersburg in attack Russia calls 'unprecedented'
breaking.summary: The city's governor urges residents to remain indoors for the first time since the beginning of the war.

breaking.title: U.S. VP Vance blames British student's murder on migrant 'invasion'
breaking.summary: "Henry Nowak died the same way a civilisation dies: abandoned, handcuffed by authorities who neither trusted nor cared for him, and accused of hate crimes he did not commit," says VP Vance
